name: WebhookNotifier
author: NORA
about: Sends a JSON POST to a webhook URL when a download completes, fails, or completes with warnings.
requirements: This script requires Python 3.8+ to be installed on your system.
description: Sends a POST request to a configured webhook URL after each download. A failed webhook never blocks or fails your download.

options.name: WebhookUrl
description: The URL to POST download events to.

commands.name: ConnectionTest
description: Send a test POST to your webhook URL to verify connectivity.
